textbox.text: Left hand for the numerical response, right hand for the JK response. Apart from that, I just went with my gut. For the nonbinary decision, I just asked myself whether I would be confident enough in their gender to approach them in a bar for a hookup attempt. If yes, conforming, if no, nonbinary.
